title: Creamy Almond Cocoa Soup
description: A rich and creamy soup made with cocoa, almonds and creamy ingredients, perfect for a cold day.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine water, cocoa powder and sugar.
Whisk until the cocoa powder is dissolved.
Add the creamy soup mix and whisk until well combined.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
Reduce the heat to low and add the almond milk.
Simmer for 5 minutes or until the soup has thickened.
Add the sliced almonds and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with extra almonds if desired.
